task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or home screen is visible in the web browser, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Linux Audit configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI shows the 'Server Administration', 'Configured Servers', or 'Linux Audit' settings page where new servers can be added.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct server hostname and IP address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Server' form shows 'bastion01' in the server name/hostname field and '192.168.1.100' in the IP address field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct username for the Linux server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username field in the credentials or authentication section of the form contains 'audit_svc'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully added the server to the configured Linux servers list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The server 'bastion01' or IP '192.168.1.100' appears in the final list or table of configured Linux servers, indicating it was saved despite any connection test failures.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual ADAudit Plus web application in a browser, not terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the server details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual ADAudit Plus form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Agent configured the server through the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent interacting with the 'Add Server' dialog and saving it, rather than modifying backend databases or config files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target server to be added is 'bastion01' with IP '192.168.1.100' and username 'audit_svc'. Since this is a synthetic server, a connection failure error is expected during the addition process. The agent must dismiss or bypass this error to successfully save the server to the configuration list.
